description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on published or edited releases, pushes to the master branch affecting contrib/docker/Dockerfile.release, or manual workflow dispatch. Run a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the code, sets up QEMU and Buildx, logs in to Docker Hub using DOCKERHUB_USERNAME and DOCKERHUB_TOKEN from secrets, and builds a Docker image by running contrib/docker/build.sh release.
